    Methods in com.orasaka.core.client that return types with arguments of type OrasakaChatResponse
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    reactor.core.publisher.Flux<OrasakaChatResponse>
    OrasakaAiClient.stream(OrasakaChatRequest request)
    Executes a unified chat interaction with automatic RAG and Tooling support, returning the response as a reactive streaming Flux.
